steps.t: Corunothiel is at Lossathrod, the encampment of Elves and dwarves at the top of Buzun-ghâr. You have dealt with the wilting rot within Buzun-ghâr and …
Orvar Bellhammer is at Lossathrod, the encampment within the passage of Buzun-ghâr, located off of Durin's Way. Corunothiel said that a message for yo…
